title: Orchestration external-agent result
description: Fixed result envelope for feasibility_verifier / implementer / adversarial_reviewer runs. This is the single canonical schema and it is written in the strict structured-output subset (every object declares additionalProperties: false and requires every property; no conditional keywords) so it can be passed verbatim to provider transports. Every role emits the same envelope: non-reviewer roles set findings/observations/suggestions/evidence_gaps to empty lists. Nullable scalars use the single representation type [string, null]. Role-specific semantic rules (three feasibility verdicts, empty changed_files for read-only roles, seven mandatory finding fields, Blocker/Major/Minor severity, empty reviewer collections for non-reviewer roles) are mechanically enforced by the runner's post-validation; an invalid result is classified INVALID_OUTPUT.

model.description: Exact model ID the run executed with.

verdict.description: Role-specific verdict. feasibility_verifier must use one of PASS_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORIZATION / PLAN_CHANGE_REQUIRED / EVIDENCE_INSUFFICIENT (enforced by runner post-validation).

evidence.description: file:line / command-output references backing the verdict.

stop_reason.description: Null when the run completed; otherwise the stop condition that was hit.

changed_files.description: Repo-relative paths changed by the run. Must be empty for read-only roles (runner-enforced).

findings.description: adversarial_reviewer only; other roles must send []. Candidate findings; only the final adjudicator (ChatGPT) may classify a candidate finding as established.

observations.description: adversarial_reviewer only; other roles must send []. Notes that do not meet the evidence bar for a finding.

suggestions.description: adversarial_reviewer only; other roles must send []. Style preferences and optional improvements. Never findings.

evidence_gaps.description: adversarial_reviewer only; other roles must send []. Claims that could not be verified with the provided packet.

output_digest.description: Optional fingerprint (e.g. trailing lines or hash) of the actual output; null when not supplied.

status_short.description: Verbatim `git status --short` output; empty string means clean.

finding.description: A candidate finding. All seven fields are mandatory; an item missing violated_requirement or repository_evidence fails runner post-validation and may only be reported as an observation or evidence gap.
